name: Potato Salad with Beer Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in a medium-size saucepan until just tender.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes.
3. Fry the bacon until crisp. Break into small pieces and mix with onion, celery, and salt; set aside.
4. In a small saucepan, stir melted butter and flour until blended.
5. Add mustard and sugar to the mixture. Slowly stir in beer and Tabasco sauce.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Pour the dressing over the potatoes.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
9. Toss lightly and let stand for 1 hour.
10. Add the bacon mixture; toss gently and serve.
